_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Nginx New
author: info@finniedj.nl
description: A clean, minimal Nginx egg for hosting any static website, with an optional PHP-FPM toggle and built-in Cloudflare Tunnel support (cloudflared runs inside this container, using its own resources).
startup: PHP_INCLUDE=/tmp/nginx-php-location.conf; CF_RESTRICT=/tmp/nginx-cf-restrict.conf; if [ "${PHP_ENABLED}" = "1" ] || [ "${PHP_ENABLED}" = "true" ]; then echo "✓ PHP включен"; cp /home/container/nginx/php-location.conf "$PHP_INCLUDE"; php-fpm83 -D; else : > "$PHP_INCLUDE"; fi; if [ "${CF_ONLY_MODE}" = "1" ] || [ "${CF_ONLY_MODE}" = "true" ]; then echo "✓ Режим CF-only включен"; { echo "allow 127.0.0.1;"; echo "allow ::1;"; echo "deny all;"; } > "$CF_RESTRICT"; else : > "$CF_RESTRICT"; fi; if [ -n "${CF_TUNNEL_TOKEN}" ]; then echo "✓ Запускаю Cloudflare Tunnel"; cloudflared tunnel --no-autoupdate run --token "${CF_TUNNEL_TOKEN}" & fi; echo "✓ Сервер запущен"; /usr/sbin/nginx -c /home/container/nginx/nginx.conf -p /home/container/

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
cd /mnt/server
git clone https://github.com/XfeaturesDEV/eggs-.git ./temp
cp -r ./temp/nginx /mnt/server/
rm -rf ./temp
mkdir /mnt/server/logs
mkdir /mnt/server/webroot

variables.name: Enable PHP
variables.description: Turns on PHP-FPM support (.php files) for this server. Leave at 0 for a plain static Nginx site.

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel Token
variables.description: Token from your Cloudflare Zero Trust tunnel (Networks > Tunnels > <tunnel> > Configure). cloudflared runs inside this container using its own CPU/network. In the tunnel's Public Hostname settings, point the service at http://localhost:<this server's port>. Leave empty to disable the tunnel.

variables.name: Cloudflare-only mode
variables.description: Blocks direct access to this server by its IP address — only traffic arriving through the local Cloudflare Tunnel (127.0.0.1) is served. Requires Cloudflare Tunnel Token to be set, otherwise the site becomes unreachable.
